app.title: PHASE
app.subtitle: Post-Harvest Analysis & Simulation Engine for irradiated foods
app.disclaimer: Relative simulation. It does not replace industrial validation.

recommendations.restore_cold_chain: Restore refrigeration and prioritize lot inspection.
recommendations.reduce_temperature: Reduce temperature to slow relative deterioration.
recommendations.adjust_humidity: Adjust humidity toward the product's optimal range.
recommendations.evaluate_higher_dose: Evaluate a higher moderate dose within safe limits.
recommendations.shorten_transport_window: Shorten the transport window or add a logistics relay.
recommendations.reduce_logistics_stress: Choose refrigerated routing or reduce transfer points.
recommendations.reduce_thermal_exposure: Reduce thermal exposure or improve lot insulation.
recommendations.manage_transport_delay: Mitigate delay with a logistics relay or rescheduling.
recommendations.prioritize_fast_distribution: Prioritize fast distribution and quality control.
recommendations.scenario_within_operational_window: Scenario is within a reasonable operating window.

alerts.cold_chain_failure_active: Cold chain failure active: deterioration accelerates in the simulation.
alerts.logistics_event_active: Logistics events active: the simulation adjusts deterioration and risk.
alerts.none: No critical alerts for the current scenario.

notes.composite_quality_index: Q combines freshness, microbiological stability, commercial value, and post-harvest integrity.
notes.dynamic_k_logistics_stress: k(t) changes with temperature, humidity, dose, and logistics stress.
notes.literature_inspired_parameters: Parameters are inspired by IAEA, FAO, WHO, USDA, and shelf-life literature.
notes.relative_risk_not_industrial_prediction: Relative analysis, not an exact industrial prediction.

twin.digital_twin_batch_transport: Each simulation conceptually represents an agricultural lot during transport, recalculating deterioration, risk, economics, and uncertainty by scenario.

science.pitch: Simulation and decision-support platform for post-harvest logistics of irradiated foods.

errors.simulation_failed: Simulation could not run. Using mock demo data.
